message:
test(labruntime): port 26 recorder_migration async tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Ports all #[tokio::test] functions from recorder_migration.rs covering M0
preflight, M2 import, M0-M2 pipeline, M3 checkpoint sync, and M5 cutover
stages. Reimplements TestEventReader, MockMigrationStorage, and
MockCheckpointStorage mock types for external test access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
